name: Grace Rahym
summary:
Overall 12+ years of strong software experience as a Java Developer and extensively experienced in Software Analysis, Design, Development, Implementation and Testing of Object-Oriented Applications and Web based Enterprise Applications using java/J2EE.
Experienced in Design and Development of multi-tier enterprise applications using Java, J2EE, Servlets, JSP, JSF, Hibernate, JDBC, API Development, Java Beans and Web services, SpringBoot & MicroService Architecture and Azure cloud migrations.
Experienced in Java Architecture Design and Development, Database design, Code Review, Performance optimization, Modularization of application and its integration.
Configured Azure App Service instead of Application server which will reduce the Cost.
Applied Scala s functional programming paradigm: higher-order functions, immutability, and pattern matching.
Designed and implemented a type-safe domain-specific language (DSL) in Scala for complex business rule validation.
Validated and enhance code quality by using AI(copilots) suggestions while maintaining best practices and coding standards.
Designed API security and JWT-based authentication ensuring compliance with enterprise standards.
Designed and developed backend services using Scala with advanced functional programming paradigms (monads, type classes, category theory).
Leveraged Typelevel ecosystem (Cats, Shapeless, FS2) to implement highly concurrent and type-safe applications.
Migrated legacy object-oriented Scala code to functional programming patterns, improving maintainability and reducing defects.
Integrate AI copilots into IDE workflows to assist with debugging, code completion, and refactoring.
Used AI copilots to generate boilerplate code, unit tests, or repetitive functions, improving developer productivity.
Served as AppDynamics Subject Matter Expert (SME), leading observability initiatives across enterprise cloud platforms including Azure and hybrid SAP environments.
Improved application performance by using Scala Futures and Promises for asynchronous programming.
Experienced in using software development methodologies (Agile, Scrum), Continuous integration and Test-Driven Development.
Implement message-driven architecture using tools like Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ, or ActiveMQ.
Design, develop, and deploy scalable, maintainable, and testable microservices using Java and Scala.
Design the application as loosely coupled microservices for scalability and maintainability.
Deployed, scaled, and optimized backend applications on AWS (EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS, DynamoDB, API Gateway).
Automated deployment pipelines using Docker and CI/CD workflows, reducing release cycle time
Implement robust and secure server-side logic using Java and Scala to support application functionalities.
Experienced with development IDEs such as Eclipse, IntelliJ and Spring tool suite, Visual studio code.
Experience with standard internet protocols such as HTTP, SMTP, HTTPS, FTP.
Experience in Agile development methodologies and Version Control tools like SVN, CVS, Accurev, Clear Case and GIT.

Implemented proactive alerting and health checks across 30+ metrics including job performance, DB utilization, memory spikes, and user activity.
Configured end-to-end SAP monitoring for Application, HANA, AWS, and Infrastructure layers using tools like SAP Solution Manager, AWS CloudWatch, and custom dashboards.
Knowledgeable in implementing and managing cloud-native applications using GCP Cloud services, such as GCP Compute Engine, GCP Cloud Functions, GCP Cloud Storage, and GCP API Gateway / Cloud Endpoints , and experienced in designing and developing cloud-native architectures.
Proficient in implementing Object Oriented Programming (OOPS) using JAVA/J2EE technologies like Core Java (OOPS, Collections, Threads), JSP, JDBC, Struts, Spring, Hibernate, Restful API & web services, Spring Boot & Micro services.
Strong Java Developer with robust expertise in Spring MVC, Spring Batch, Spring Security, and Hibernate/JPA.
Designed and implemented scalable microservices architecture supporting millions of transactions.
Conducted architectural reviews, contributed to design decisions and performance optimizations.
Improved multithreading and async event-driven design.
Lead analysis of existing systems and plan end-to-end migration strategies to cloud-native architectures.
Developed and maintained batch processing jobs using Spring Batch for high-volume data workflows
Utilized JPA/Hibernate for ORM mapping and fine-tuned performance with custom queries and caching strategies
Write automation scripts for ETL, log analysis, and data processing and Build data pipelines and reporting solutions using Pandas, NumPy.
Develop ML/AI models (if required) using TensorFlow / Scikit-learn and Create lightweight APIs/services using Flask or FastAPI.
Integrate Python tools/scripts with existing Java applications and Support DevOps automation with Python scripts (infrastructure, CI/CD).
Write test automation frameworks and monitoring tools in Python.
Experience with JavaScript and JavaScript frame works JQuery, JQuery UI, AngularJS.
Provided 24x7 on call support in production environment on rotation basis.
Designed and developed enterprise-scale applications using Java, J2EE, Spring Boot, Microservices, and REST APIs.
Led development teams to deliver high-quality software solutions on schedule and within budget.
Hands-on expertise in Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) including component development, template creation, content workflows, digital asset management (DAM), and integration with e-commerce platforms.
Applied AEM best practices for performance optimization, scalability, and maintainability.
Developed front-end solutions using JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap, React, and HTML5 to deliver responsive, user-friendly interfaces.
Built and deployed applications on cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) leveraging cloud-native services for scalability and performance.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD for automated builds, testing, and deployments.
Applied DevOps practices with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible) to improve deployment efficiency.
Designed and deployed containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes, enabling distributed and fault-tolerant systems.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams (architects, DBAs, security, QA) to ensure compliance, reliability, and alignment with enterprise standards.
Hands-on experience with JSF and RichFaces
Experienced in using web/application servers such as Apache Tomcat, IBM WebSphere, IBM WebLogic.
Experience with XML and related standards and technologies like SOA, Web Services and API integration experience, SOAP, WSDL, XML, JAXB, JAX-WS, PowerBI reports.
Integrated AWS-based SAP infrastructure monitoring (EC2, EBS, RDS, network) with real-time alerting for latency, CPU utilization, and storage thresholds.
Enabled infrastructure-level observability using SAP Host Agent, Diagnostics Agent, and third-party tools for OS, memory, disk, and network insights.
Tuned and resolved performance bottlenecks on OpenShift and cloud-hosted SAP systems, collaborating with platform and cloud teams.
Resolved critical production issues by performing root cause analysis and delivering permanent fixes.
Created custom monitoring dashboards for SAP Basis and Support teams to visualize real -time and historical trends across all critical systems.
Supported incident response and RCA (Root Cause Analysis) through structured log review (ST22, SM21, SLG1) and error-tracking schema (ERR_ID, ERR_JSON).
Integrated AppDynamics APM with SAP/non-SAP applications to monitor end-to-end transaction performance.
Deployed AppDynamics agents (Machine Agent, Java Agent, Database Agent) across cloud/on-prem workloads to capture deep-dive performance telemetry.
Analyzed performance anomalies using AppDynamics Flow Maps and Snapshots, aiding in rapid root cause identification for production incidents.
Proficient in Core Java with strong understanding of data structures, algorithms, Collections, Concurrency, Multithreading, Event handling and performance tuning.
Experienced in integrating enterprise applications using JMS, SOAP and RESTful Web services
Set up Jenkins server and build jobs to provide continuous automated builds based on polling the Git source control system.
Experience in developing web applications using Spring MVC frame work and Object-Relational Mapping (ORM) technologies such as JPA, Hibernate and Eclipse.

Proficient in implementation of frameworks like spring, JSF, AJAX frameworks and ORM frameworks like Hibernate.
Integrated backend services with cloud-native databases i.e Cloud SQL, MongoDB, and AlloyDB
Engineered and optimized complex SQL queries for DB2 databases, reducing query execution time.
Deployed scalable Java applications on Apache Tomcat, ensuring stable server performance in production environments.
Worked extensively with Linux-based environments, performing server setups and log analysis for issue resolution.
Collaborated with database administrators to design and implement optimized DB2 schemas for business applications.
Develop server-side logic using PHP to handle requests, process data, and generate dynamic web pages. Implement features that enhance the user experience on the server side.
Experience with JavaScript and JavaScript frame works JQuery, JQuery UI, AngularJS.
Provided 24x7 on call support in production environment on rotation basis.
